_comment: EXAMPLE invoicing config (v0.10.2 schema). Copied + filled per firm at onboarding into <workspace>/_firma/config/invoicing.json. All names/values here are synthetic placeholders — no real client data. Keys read by compute.ts: vat_rate, tiers (ALWAYS montage/fahrt per tier — legacy single-rate shapes abort with a migration message), default_tier, zuschlag_samstag, zuschlag_sonntag, weekend_days (only 6 and/or 0), people (incl. optional vehicle), vehicles, pflicht_pause_h, daily_cap_total_h, pause_pre_applied, spesen, hotel_cost, kfz_rate_per_km. The rest (mandant, sites incl. anreise_km, anreise_km_ab_firmensitz, filename_schema, output_paths) are used by the skill, not the math.

vehicles._comment: OPTIONAL — nur noetig, wenn km/Fahrzeugkosten separat als eigene Geraete-Position abgerechnet werden (statt pauschal in den Stundensatz eingepreist). Jede Zeile mit km>0 braucht ein aufloesbares Fahrzeug (row.vehicle oder people[...].vehicle).

sites._comment: OPTIONAL per-site overrides. Omit a site to use the defaults + ask hotel per run. 'match' = how the site appears on timesheets. 'anreise_km' = one-way distance Firmensitz->Baustelle, used at extraction time when anreise_km_ab_firmensitz is true (Montagebau-Preset) — not read by compute.ts.

output_paths._comment: Where the finished invoice + mirrored timesheet go. Default = workspace _ausgang/. Override with the firm's real folders (path-picker). Patterns may use <KW>/<Jahr>.
